zh.lifeSummary: Edeline Ingleby是Isobel CONSTABLE的女兒，出生。她於大約1308年與Sir Thomas Ingleby結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞利普利利普利 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Ingleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Ingleby (in Lincolnshire, Yorkshire, and Derbyshire). The placenames mean ‘farmstead of the English’, from Old English Engle ‘English’ (genitive plural Engla) + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Edeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Edeline Ingleby was born as the daughter of Isobel CONSTABLE. She married Sir Thomas Ingleby about 1308. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She was buried in Ripley Churchyard, Ripley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Edeline InglebyはIsobel CONSTABLEの娘として生まれた。約1308年にSir Thomas Inglebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリススリーリプリーリプリー チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Ripley Churchyard, Ripley, Surrey, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 수리 리플리 리플리 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Edeline Ingleby(은)는 Isobel CONSTABLE의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1308년 Sir Thomas Ingleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 수리 리플리 리플리 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.
